topics.name: Audiovisual techniques
topics.description: Methods for composing, synchronizing, rendering, and presenting sound and moving image.

topics.name: Sound design
topics.description: Field recording, Foley, source separation, spatial sound, mixing, and tools for working with sound against picture.

topics.name: Generative media
topics.description: Research and practice in generated video, audio, music, animation, and multimodal creative systems.

topics.name: Real-time graphics
topics.description: GPU graphics, shaders, particles, point clouds, live rendering, and interactive visual systems.

topics.name: Creative tooling
topics.description: Interfaces and production tools that materially improve a working creative process.

topics.name: Media art
topics.description: Installations, performances, exhibitions, and criticism centered on sound, image, code, light, and technology.

topics.name: Experimental music
topics.description: New composition, electronic music, spatial listening, performance systems, and adventurous music theater.

topics.name: Berlin events
topics.description: High-signal exhibitions, performances, screenings, workshops, and festivals that are practical to attend in Berlin.

topics.name: Adobe Research
topics.description: Creative AI, audio, video, graphics, and human-computer interaction research from Adobe.

topics.name: Meta AI Research
topics.description: Open research in audio, computer vision, world models, and multimodal systems from Meta.

topics.name: Google DeepMind
topics.description: Selected work on video, audio, world models, and machine perception from Google DeepMind.

topics.name: MIT Media Lab
topics.description: Selected research where computation, media, perception, and creative practice meet.

topics.name: Ryoji Ikeda
topics.description: New work, installations, performances, and substantial interviews concerning sound, light, mathematics, and data.

topics.name: Holly Herndon
topics.description: New music, performances, tools, and research spanning voice, machine learning, and digital culture.

topics.name: TouchDesigner
topics.description: Important releases, techniques, documentation, and exemplary projects from the TouchDesigner ecosystem.

topics.name: Berlin Art Week
topics.description: Program announcements and selected audiovisual work from Berlin Art Week and its participating spaces.

topics.name: P61 Gallery
topics.description: Digital-art exhibitions and audiovisual presentations at P61 Gallery in Berlin.

topics.name: silent green
topics.description: Selected concerts, festivals, installations, screenings, and interdisciplinary programs at silent green.

topics.name: Deutsche Oper Berlin
topics.description: Music theater and performances with notable sound, video, staging, or technical ambition.

topics.name: Haus der Kulturen der Welt
topics.description: Selected exhibitions, discourse, sound, performance, and moving-image programs at HKW Berlin.

topics.name: Generic AI roundups
topics.description: Exclude undifferentiated product lists, rumor posts, and trend summaries without primary evidence or a useful technique.

topics.name: Beginner-only tutorials
topics.description: Exclude basic introductions unless they establish a genuinely useful foundation for a new tool or method.

topics.name: Sponsored content
topics.description: Exclude advertorials, affiliate-driven recommendations, and unmarked promotional coverage.

topics.name: Crypto and NFT speculation
topics.description: Exclude token markets and NFT speculation unless directly necessary to understand a substantial artwork or event.
